info.title: Ecomapp-buildTime
info.description: API specification for Ecomapp-buildTime, providing endpoints to manage and operate the e-commerce application.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management, including listing, adding, updating, and deleting products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, order tracking, and order history.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User management operations such as registration, authentication, profile updates, and user roles.

tags.name: cart
tags.description: Functionalities for managing shopping cart items and cart checkout.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product and quantity to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. The request body should provide the cart item details. Successful addition returns the updated cart state.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

200.description: Item successfully added to cart and updated cart returned

400.description: Invalid request, such as missing or invalid cart item data

example.message: The provided cart item data is invalid or missing required fields

details.issue: Product identifier is missing or invalid

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve all items in a user's shopping cart
get.description: Fetches the current contents of the shopping cart for the user identified by userId. Returns the cart details including all items and their quantities.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid userId or malformed parameters

example.message: The userId provided is not valid
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: This operation allows a user to place a new order by providing the necessary order details. The endpoint processes the order and returns the order confirmation and details.

requestBody.description: Order details for placing a new order

quantity.description: Quantity of the product to order

200.description: Order placed successfully. Returns order confirmation details.

400.description: Invalid order data or missing required fields.

example.message: Provided order data is invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: Must contain at least one product with quantity > 0

404.description: User ID specified does not exist.

example.message: The specified userId does not exist.

details.issue: User not found for the given identifier

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing the order.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve a specific order by order ID
get.description: Fetch detailed information about an order specified by its unique orderId. Returns order details including items, status, and delivery information if applicable.

example.message: The orderId provided is not valid.

details.issue: Malformed or incorrect order ID format

404.description: Order with the specified ID not found.

example.message: No order found with the given orderId.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while retrieving the order.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a new payment process using the provided payment details. The request body must contain all information required to process the payment. On success, returns payment confirmation and transaction details.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request payload including payment method, amount, and currency.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid payment details or missing required information.

example.message: Provided payment information is incomplete or formatted incorrectly.

details.issue: Card number is missing or invalid.

402.description: Payment required or failed due to insufficient funds or declined transaction.

example.message: The payment was declined by the issuing bank.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing the payment.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive payment status updates via webhook
post.description: This endpoint receives asynchronous payment status notifications from the payment processor. The webhook payload must include transaction details and status updates for reconciliation.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload containing payment transaction status and reference details.

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or missing required fields.

example.message: Payload missing required transactionId or status field.

402.description: Payment related error reflected via webhook, such as failed or declined transaction.

example.message: The payment failed according to webhook notification.

500.description: Internal server error while processing the webhook.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the catalog with the provided details. The request body must contain all necessary product information. On success, returns the created product details.

requestBody.description: The product details to add to the catalog

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid product data provided

example.message: One or more fields in the product request are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the given SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipment status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current tracking information for the specified order by its unique identifier. Provides shipment status and history.

example.message: No tracking information available for the given order ID.

details.issue: Order ID not found in system

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Register a new user by providing necessary account information in the request body. On successful registration, returns the created user details.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid user input

example.message: One or more fields have invalid values

409.description: User already exists with provided email or username

example.message: A user with the given email or username already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the price, using ISO 4217 format.

discount.description: Discount applied to the item price.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount is applied.

price.description: Original price of the item before any discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product added to the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for all prices in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts.

totalAmount.description: Sum of item prices before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discounts applied to the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last cart update in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who owns the cart.

discount.description: Discount applied on this ordered item.

finalPrice.description: Final price for the item after discount.

price.description: Original price of the item before discount.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the order was created in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code for all prices in the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for this order.

totalAmount.description: Sum of item prices before discounts in the order.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the order in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order related to this payment.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processing this payment.

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment used (e.g., CreditCard, PayPal).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created in ISO 8601 format.

orderId.description: Order ID associated with this payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to complete the payment.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier returned by the payment gateway.

gatewayResponse.description: Response details from the payment gateway.

paymentId.description: Identifier of the payment from the gateway.

status.description: Current status of the payment from the webhook.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the gateway.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

description.example: A wireless mouse with ergonomic design.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the price (ISO 4217 format)

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

rating.description: Average user rating for the product

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the shipment

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier from the courier

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency code preferred by the user for transactions

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, regular)

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency code preferred by the user for transactions

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, regular)

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the issue

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error occurred

path.description: API endpoint path where the error was triggered

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request that caused the error

details.description: Array of specific validation or error details

field.description: Field in error or causing issue

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error occurred

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request that caused the error
